page_metadata.biotools__summary: Based on a formal on/off model of gene expression, but uses a non-parametric procedure based on decision trees (called “jump trees”) to reconstruct the GRN topology, allowing the inference of networks of hundreds of genes.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Based on a formal on/off model of gene expression, but uses a non-parametric procedure based on decision trees (called “jump trees”) to reconstruct the GRN topology, allowing the inference of networks of hundreds of genes.
